title: epipactis majellensis
intro: Epipactis majellensis is a species of orchid commonly known as the Majella Helleborine, which is a type of terrestrial orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues due to its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Epipactis majellensis include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant's aerial parts are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
